mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_TYPE = #{c} AND P_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT P.*, U.USER_NAME FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.P_TYPE = #{pType} AND P.P_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY
P.VIEWS DESC P.VIEWS ASC P.P_DATE DESC
SELECT * FROM POST JOIN USERS USING(USER_ID) WHERE P_NUMBER = #{id} AND P_STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO POST VALUES(#{rNumber}, #{rTitle}, #{rContents}, DEFAULT, SYSDATE, #{pType}, #{userId}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.*, U.USER_NAME, NVL(L.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P_NUMBER, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM P_LIKE GROUP BY P_NUMBER ) L ON P.P_NUMBER = L.P_NUMBER WHERE P.P_TYPE = 'R' AND P.P_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY VIEWS DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.P_TYPE = 'R' AND ( P.P_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR U.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT P.*, U.USER_NAME FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.P_TYPE = 'R' AND ( P.P_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR U.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY
P.VIEWS DESC P.VIEWS ASC P.P_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST JOIN USERS USING(USER_ID) WHERE P_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM POST JOIN USERS USING(USER_ID) WHERE P_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY P_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{pi.startRow} AND #{pi.endRow}
SELECT * FROM REPLY JOIN USERS USING(USER_ID) WHERE P_NUMBER = #{pNumber} AND C_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY C_NUMBER DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY VALUES(SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{comments}, DEFAULT, #{pNumber}, #{userId}, DEFAULT)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM P_LIKE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND P_NUMBER = #{pNumber}
